title: Smarty US Address Request
description: Input object for validating a single US street address via the Smarty US Street Address API.

input_id.description: A unique identifier for this address in your application; returned unchanged in the response.

street.description: The street line of the address to be verified. This can also contain the entire address (freeform).

street2.description: Apartment, suite, or other secondary unit designator.

secondary.description: Aptartment or suite number, if present.

lastline.description: City, state, and ZIP Code combined.

addressee.description: The name of the recipient, firm, or company at this address.

urbanization.description: Only used with Puerto Rican addresses.

candidates.description: Maximum number of valid addresses to return when the input is ambiguous.

match.description: The match strategy to use: strict returns only valid USPS addresses, invalid also returns non-USPS addresses, enhanced includes additional address types.
